notes: The PKG.* package-integrity family, all deterministic (engine/gate/validate-package.js) and all HARD. Positives apply an 'override' (deep-merge onto base.package.json) and/or 'omit' (dotted-path field deletion) so base.package.json stays schema-valid for the schema-validation CI job; the runner mutates an in-memory clone, mirroring the live validate-package test. PKG.PACKAGE_INVALID is registered in rules/codes.md but has NO deterministic emit path in the shipped validate-package.js (a malformed package surfaces as the specific structural codes below, e.g. AUDIT_HEADER_MISSING + the *_MISSING set), so it ships as a contract-only entry with no live-executed case.

cases.name: gate-verdict-missing-for-live
cases.notes: A LIVE-bound package with no explicit gate verdict.

cases.name: enrichment-packet-leak

recommended.text:
thesis: builders ship
The Acme Cosmos beta wrapped this weekend with sixty demos.

cases.notes: An internal enrichment-packet marker ('thesis:') leaked into the public Recommended copy.

cases.name: source-stack-missing
cases.notes: Copy cites a source (item_id) but the package carries no Source Stack.

cases.name: package-invalid-contract-only
cases.notes: Registry-defined (rules/codes.md) but NOT emitted by the shipped validate-package.js — a malformed package surfaces as the specific structural codes instead. Pinned here for registry-integrity coverage only; the runner skips execution (executed_in_ci:false).

cases.name: clean
cases.notes: Complete, ready, SAFE-mode text package with scores and no cited source — no PKG.* code.
